tiles.label: Chicago Fed ANFCI
tiles.note: adjusted NFCI; weekly composite; detect-on-composites anchor

tiles.label: St. Louis Fed FSI (STLFSI4)
tiles.note: weekly composite; reserved freshness window, optional anchor

tiles.label: VIX
tiles.note: prices insurance, orthogonal to SPX level

tiles.label: Fed Broad USD (DTWEXBGS)
tiles.note: Broad = economic gauge; DXY is EUR-story proxy

tiles.label: Copper / Gold ratio
tiles.note: clean growth read (daily copper/gold ratio supersedes monthly-copper); oil is geopolitics-contaminated

tiles.label: Rates vol (MOVE proxy)
tiles.note: free proxy = 20d realized vol of DGS10 changes; ^MOVE delayed if licensed

tiles.label: % S&P >200DMA
tiles.note: KNOWN-UNAVAILABLE: no clean free %>200DMA feed (StockCharts $SPXA200R gated); BREADTH axis covered by rsp_spy

tiles.label: Net Liquidity (WALCL-TGA-RRP)
tiles.note: CONSTRUCT, not a Fed metric — context_only (see knobs.net_liquidity)

plumbing_flags.name: srf_takeup
plumbing_flags.note: SRF take-up 0.0bn off zero = funding stress

plumbing_flags.name: net_liq_5d_drop
plumbing_flags.note: Net liquidity 5d change -34210 — CONTEXT only, not an oracle (knobs.net_liquidity=context_only)
